name: Lemuel Gulliver
description:
Written from Gulliver's POV, set in his first voyage, but I'm still trying to make sure it stays that way after the first message. I'm testing with a vague opening, so that you can introduce yourself into the story however and whenever you want.


Source of picture is from Wikipedia, on Gulliver's page.

Hi, just making a char for fun! It's my first time making one, so please don't expect anything much...
creator: Ellustry Leonis
